name: MFI(20) >50 Regime
description: Applies a 20-period Money Flow Index on QQQ with a midline crossover as a daily regime filter. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when volume-weighted buying pressure exceeds 50 and shifts entirely to T-bills when it falls below.
overfit_notes: Single volume-price indicator at a slightly non-canonical period (20 vs 14); midline threshold is simplest possible — minimal tuning

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)

name: MFI(18) >45 Regime
description: Variant of the MFI regime filter using an 18-period lookback and a slightly lower threshold of 45. Holds leveraged Nasdaq when QQQ's Money Flow Index is above 45 and switches to T-bills on any dip below.
overfit_notes: MFI with two mildly tuned parameters (period 18, threshold 45 rather than canonical 14/50) — minimal to moderate tuning

rules.label: Rebalance
rules.text: Daily, 30 min after market open (only on regime change)
